children.label: tone
children.value: light medium skin tone, neutral undertones

children.label: environment
children.value: backyard settings, fence and grassy areas, some plantation

children.label: props
children.value: wall or railing as support element

children.label: subject.dress.layering
children.value: open jacket or coat over top, unfastened

children.label: photography_style
children.value: observational 'slice of life' style, captures the subject in a way that feels like a shared living space, zero-glamour, focused on the raw honesty of the moment

children.label: quality
children.value: very soft light, almost shadowless, wraps around subject

children.label: subject_position
children.value: subject positioned left of frame, right side open

children.label: color_palette
children.value: warm neutrals, cream, tan, warm grey

children.label: color_palette_2
children.value: earthy tones, brown, ochre, rust, olive

children.label: detail_level
children.value: high detail, sharp and defined throughout
